query:
INSERT INTO store_items (name, category, price, description, thumbnailUrl, artist) VALUES 
('Cyber Jacket', 'clothing', 150, 'Futuristic cyber jacket by Andre Ferwerda', 'https://placehold.co/300x300/1F2937/E1E7EF?text=Cyber+Jacket', 'Andre Ferwerda'),
('Urban Streetwear', 'clothing', 120, 'Modern urban streetwear collection by Andre Ferwerda', 'https://placehold.co/300x300/1F2937/E1E7EF?text=Urban+Streetwear', 'Andre Ferwerda'),
('Futuristic Suit', 'clothing', 200, 'Premium futuristic suit by Andre Ferwerda', 'https://placehold.co/300x300/1F2937/E1E7EF?text=Futuristic+Suit', 'Andre Ferwerda'),
('Casual Wear', 'clothing', 100, 'Comfortable casual wear by Andre Ferwerda', 'https://placehold.co/300x300/1F2937/E1E7EF?text=Casual+Wear', 'Andre Ferwerda'),
('Evening Dress', 'clothing', 180, 'Elegant evening dress by Andre Ferwerda', 'https://placehold.co/300x300/1F2937/E1E7EF?text=Evening+Dress', 'Andre Ferwerda'),
('Tactical Gear', 'clothing', 160, 'Professional tactical gear by Andre Ferwerda', 'https://placehold.co/300x300/1F2937/E1E7EF?text=Tactical+Gear', 'Andre Ferwerda');
